```{=html}
<style>
[data-widget="w-btm-projects"] * { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }
[data-widget="w-btm-projects"] { font-family: inherit; line-height: 1.6; }
[data-widget="w-btm-projects"] .container {
    max-width: none; margin: 0; background: transparent;
    box-shadow: none; border: none; border-radius: 0; padding: 0.5rem 0;
}
[data-widget="w-btm-projects"] .header {
    background: #2a7d6f; color: white; padding: 18px 24px;
    text-align: center; border-radius: 8px 8px 0 0;
}
[data-widget="w-btm-projects"] .header h1 { font-size: 1.15rem; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 4px; }
[data-widget="w-btm-projects"] .header p { font-size: 0.72rem; opacity: 0.85; }
[data-widget="w-btm-projects"] .stats-bar {
    display: flex; justify-content: space-around;
    background: #f8f9fa; padding: 14px; border-bottom: 2px solid #e9ecef;
}
[data-widget="w-btm-projects"] .stat { text-align: center; }
[data-widget="w-btm-projects"] .stat-number { font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: bold; color: #2a7d6f; }
[data-widget="w-btm-projects"] .stat-label {
    font-size: 0.62rem; color: #6c757d;
    text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.06em; margin-top: 2px;
}
[data-widget="w-btm-projects"] .tab-bar {
    display: flex; gap: 6px; padding: 14px 18px 0; flex-wrap: wrap;
    background: white; border-bottom: 1px solid #e9ecef;
    padding-bottom: 14px;
}
[data-widget="w-btm-projects"] .tab-btn {
    border: 1px solid #e4e4e7; background: white; padding: 5px 13px;
    border-radius: 6px; cursor: pointer; font-size: 0.72rem; font-weight: 500;
    color: #666; transition: all 0.15s; font-family: inherit; line-height: 1.5;
}
[data-widget="w-btm-projects"] .tab-btn:hover { border-color: #2a7d6f; color: #2a7d6f; }
[data-widget="w-btm-projects"] .tab-btn.active {
    background: #2a7d6f; color: white; border-color: #2a7d6f;
}
[data-widget="w-btm-projects"] .cards-grid {
    display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap: 12px; padding: 18px;
}
@media (max-width: 900px) {
    [data-widget="w-btm-projects"] .cards-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); }
}
@media (max-width: 560px) {
    [data-widget="w-btm-projects"] .cards-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
}
[data-widget="w-btm-projects"] .project-card {
    border: 1px solid #e4e4e7; border-radius: 8px; padding: 13px;
    background: white; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 7px; font-size: 0.77rem;
}
[data-widget="w-btm-projects"] .project-card.has-ccs { border-left: 3px solid #2a7d6f; }
[data-widget="w-btm-projects"] .project-card.hidden { display: none; }
[data-widget="w-btm-projects"] .card-badges { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 4px; }
[data-widget="w-btm-projects"] .card-name {
    font-weight: 700; font-size: 0.86rem; color: #1a1a1a; line-height: 1.3;
}
[data-widget="w-btm-projects"] .card-name small {
    font-weight: 400; font-size: 0.70rem; color: #888; display: block; margin-top: 2px;
}
[data-widget="w-btm-projects"] .card-location { font-size: 0.70rem; color: #999; margin-top: -3px; }
[data-widget="w-btm-projects"] .card-capacity { font-size: 1.1rem; font-weight: 700; color: #2a7d6f; line-height: 1.2; }
[data-widget="w-btm-projects"] .card-capacity small { font-size: 0.70rem; font-weight: 400; color: #888; display: block; }
[data-widget="w-btm-projects"] .card-fields { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 4px; flex: 1; }
[data-widget="w-btm-projects"] .card-field { font-size: 0.73rem; line-height: 1.4; color: #444; }
[data-widget="w-btm-projects"] .field-label {
    font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.62rem; color: #aaa;
    text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.04em; margin-right: 3px;
}
[data-widget="w-btm-projects"] .card-supply {
    font-size: 0.68rem; color: #bbb; border-top: 1px solid #f0f0f0;
    padding-top: 7px; margin-top: 3px; line-height: 1.4;
}
[data-widget="w-btm-projects"] .badge {
    display: inline-block; padding: 2px 7px; border-radius: 6px;
    font-size: 0.62rem; font-weight: 600; white-space: nowrap;
}
[data-widget="w-btm-projects"] .badge-operational { background: #d4edda; color: #155724; }
[data-widget="w-btm-projects"] .badge-construction { background: #fff3cd; color: #856404; }
[data-widget="w-btm-projects"] .badge-planning { background: #cce5ff; color: #004085; }
[data-widget="w-btm-projects"] .badge-ccs { background: #d1ecf1; color: #0c5460; }
[data-widget="w-btm-projects"] .badge-no-ccs { background: #f8d7da; color: #721c24; }
[data-widget="w-btm-projects"] .key-insights {
    background: #f8f9fa; padding: 18px 20px; margin: 0 18px 18px;
    border-radius: 8px; border-left: 4px solid #2a7d6f;
}
[data-widget="w-btm-projects"] .key-insights h2 { color: #2c3e50; margin-bottom: 10px; font-size: 0.9rem; font-weight: 700; }
[data-widget="w-btm-projects"] .key-insights ul { list-style: none; padding-left: 0; }
[data-widget="w-btm-projects"] .key-insights li {
    padding: 5px 0 5px 18px; position: relative; font-size: 0.75rem; line-height: 1.5;
}
[data-widget="w-btm-projects"] .key-insights li:before { content: "→"; position: absolute; left: 0; color: #2a7d6f; font-weight: bold; }
[data-widget="w-btm-projects"] .footer {
    background: #f4f4f5; color: #666; padding: 12px; text-align: center;
    font-size: 0.68rem; border-top: 1px solid #e4e4e7; border-radius: 0 0 8px 8px;
}
</style>
<div data-widget="w-btm-projects">
<div class="container">
    <div class="header">
        <h1>Behind-the-Meter Natural Gas Data Center Projects</h1>
        <p>Updated: May 2026</p>
    </div>
    <div class="stats-bar">
        <div class="stat"><div class="stat-number">28</div><div class="stat-label">Total Projects</div></div>
        <div class="stat"><div class="stat-number">~55 GW</div><div class="stat-label">Combined Capacity</div></div>
        <div class="stat"><div class="stat-number">5</div><div class="stat-label">With CCS Plans</div></div>
        <div class="stat"><div class="stat-number">9</div><div class="stat-label">Renewables Co-located</div></div>
    </div>

    <div class="tab-bar">
        <button class="tab-btn active" data-tab="all">All (27)</button>
        <button class="tab-btn" data-tab="operational">Operational (3)</button>
        <button class="tab-btn" data-tab="construction">Under Construction (13)</button>
        <button class="tab-btn" data-tab="development">Development (10)</button>
        <button class="tab-btn" data-tab="on-hold">On Hold (1)</button>
    </div>

    <div class="cards-grid">

        <div class="project-card" data-status="construction">
            <div class="card-badges"><span class="badge badge-construction">Under Construction / Expanding</span></div>
            <div class="card-name">Meta Hyperion</div>
            <div class="card-location">Richland Parish, Louisiana (Franklin Farm)</div>
            <div class="card-capacity">~7.5 GW total<small>10 gas plants approved Mar 2026 · 1.5 GW solar</small></div>
            <div class="card-fields">
                <div class="card-field"><span class="field-label">Tech</span>Three GE 7HA H-class combined-cycle turbines</div>
                <div class="card-field"><span class="field-label">Renewables</span>1.5 GW solar · 1–4 GW nuclear (RFP early 2030s)</div>
                <div class="card-field"><span class="field-label">Timeline</span>Units 1–3 online 2028–2029; full 10-plant campus by 2030; $27B investment</div>
            </div>
            <div class="card-supply">Gas: Haynesville Shale (14.7–15 Bcf/d) · existing pipeline infrastructure</div>
        </div>

        <div class="project-card" data-status="construction">
            <div class="card-badges"><span class="badge badge-construction">Under Construction</span></div>
            <div class="card-name">Meta Socrates/Prometheus</div>
            <div class="card-location">New Albany, Ohio (740-acre campus)</div>
            <div class="card-capacity">400 MW<small>2 × 200 MW BTM plants</small></div>
            <div class="card-fields">
                <div class="card-field"><span class="field-label">Tech</span>3× Solar Titan 250, 9× Solar PGM130, 3× Siemens SGT-400, 15× CAT 3520</div>
                <div class="card-field"><span class="field-label">Timeline</span>Plato North Q3 2026; Plato South Q4 2026</div>
            </div>
            <div class="card-supply">Gas: Williams Companies · new 24-inch pipelines by Williams</div>
        </div>

        <div class="project-card" data-status="operational">
            <div class="card-badges">
                <span class="badge badge-operational">Operational (Site 1)</span>
                <span class="badge badge-planning">Planning (Site 2)</span>
            </div>
            <div class="card-name">xAI Memphis Colossus</div>
            <div class="card-location">Memphis, Tennessee (Sites 1 &amp; 2)</div>
            <div class="card-capacity">422 MW operational<small>2 GW target — EPA loophole closed Jan 2026</small></div>
            <div class="card-fields">
                <div class="card-field"><span class="field-label">Tech</span>35 trailer turbines (~12 MW each) · 60 permanent turbines ordered</div>
                <div class="card-field"><span class="field-label">Renewables</span>150 MW Tesla Megapacks · TVA grid (60% renewable mix)</div>
                <div class="card-field"><span class="field-label">Timeline</span>Site 1 operational 2024; Site 2 planning phase, expansion ongoing</div>
            </div>
            <div class="card-supply">Gas: Local 16" main · regional suppliers via utility pipelines</div>
        </div>

        <div class="project-card" data-status="construction">
            <div class="card-badges"><span class="badge badge-construction">Permitting</span></div>
            <div class="card-name">EdgeConneX PowerConneX</div>
            <div class="card-location">New Albany, Ohio (49-acre site)</div>
            <div class="card-capacity">120 MW</div>
            <div class="card-fields">
                <div class="card-field"><span class="field-label">Tech</span>Natural gas turbines (configuration TBD)</div>
                <div class="card-field"><span class="field-label">Timeline</span>Build Q4 2025–Q1 2026</div>
            </div>
            <div class="card-supply">Gas: National Gas and Oil Cooperative · connect to existing pipelines</div>
        </div>

        <div class="project-card has-ccs" data-status="operational">
            <div class="card-badges">
                <span class="badge badge-operational">Partially Operational</span>
                <span class="badge badge-ccs">Post-Combustion CCS</span>
            </div>
            <div class="card-name">Oracle/OpenAI Stargate (Abilene)</div>
            <div class="card-location">Abilene, West Texas — Lancium Clean Campus</div>
            <div class="card-capacity">&gt;1.2 GW</div>
            <div class="card-fields">
                <div class="card-field"><span class="field-label">Tech</span>GE Vernova gas turbines + Solar Turbines · 360.5 MW gas · &gt;90% CCS planned (45Q)</div>
                <div class="card-field"><span class="field-label">Renewables</span>West Texas wind · on-site solar · large battery storage</div>
                <div class="card-field"><span class="field-label">Timeline</span>First halls Oct 2025; expansion cancelled Mar 2026 (capped at 6 buildings)</div>
            </div>
            <div class="card-supply">Gas: Texas network near Permian · Lancium campus pipeline access</div>
        </div>

        <div class="project-card has-ccs" data-status="construction">
            <div class="card-badges">
                <span class="badge badge-construction">Advanced Development</span>
                <span class="badge badge-ccs">&gt;90% CO₂ Capture</span>
            </div>
            <div class="card-name">Chevron Permian BTM Project</div>
            <div class="card-location">Permian Basin, West Texas</div>
            <div class="card-capacity">Up to 5 GW<small>2.5 GW initial phase</small></div>
            <div class="card-fields">
                <div class="card-field"><span class="field-label">Tech</span>Up to 7× GE 7HA combined-cycle turbines · post-combustion CCS-ready</div>
                <div class="card-field"><span class="field-label">Timeline</span>Microsoft exclusive offtake Apr 2026 (~$7B); 2.5 GW by 2027; 4 GW full build</div>
            </div>
            <div class="card-supply">Gas: On-site Permian fields · direct Chevron infrastructure</div>
        </div>

        <div class="project-card has-ccs" data-status="development">
            <div class="card-badges">
                <span class="badge badge-planning">In Development</span>
                <span class="badge badge-ccs">CDR Offsets</span>
            </div>
            <div class="card-name">Prometheus Evanston Campus</div>
            <div class="card-location">Evanston, Wyoming</div>
            <div class="card-capacity">1.2 GW</div>
            <div class="card-fields">
                <div class="card-field"><span class="field-label">Tech</span>Low-carbon natural gas (PureWest certified) · 500k tonnes/yr CDR credits</div>
                <div class="card-field"><span class="field-label">Renewables</span>Wind farms · 100 MW SMR planned</div>
                <div class="card-field"><span class="field-label">Timeline</span>Online 2026</div>
            </div>
            <div class="card-supply">Gas: Certified low-methane gas · local Wyoming supply</div>
        </div>

        <div class="project-card" data-status="development">
            <div class="card-badges"><span class="badge badge-planning">Development</span></div>
            <div class="card-name">IEP Greene County</div>
            <div class="card-location">Greene County, Pennsylvania</div>
            <div class="card-capacity">944 MW</div>
            <div class="card-fields">
                <div class="card-field"><span class="field-label">Tech</span>Combined-cycle gas turbines</div>
                <div class="card-field"><span class="field-label">Renewables</span>Battery storage included</div>
                <div class="card-field"><span class="field-label">Timeline</span>Online by Q1 2029</div>
            </div>
            <div class="card-supply">Gas: Peoples Gas · local connection · emergency PJM grid backup</div>
        </div>

        <div class="project-card" data-status="construction">
            <div class="card-badges"><span class="badge badge-construction">Early Construction</span></div>
            <div class="card-name">Joule Millard County Campus</div>
            <div class="card-location">Millard County, Utah</div>
            <div class="card-capacity">1 GW Phase 1<small>4 GW long-term (Caterpillar partnership)</small></div>
            <div class="card-fields">
                <div class="card-field"><span class="field-label">Tech</span>Cat reciprocating gas engines + battery storage</div>
                <div class="card-field"><span class="field-label">Timeline</span>Groundbreaking Nov 2025; construction underway</div>
            </div>
            <div class="card-supply">Gas: New pipeline tie-in near IPP gas conversion</div>
        </div>

        <div class="project-card" data-status="construction">
            <div class="card-badges"><span class="badge badge-construction">Under Construction</span></div>
            <div class="card-name">Oracle Frontier (Shackelford TX)</div>
            <div class="card-location">Shackelford County, West Texas (1,200 acres)</div>
            <div class="card-capacity">1.4 GW<small>multi-hundred MW gas BTM · no grid tie</small></div>
            <div class="card-fields">
                <div class="card-field"><span class="field-label">Tech</span>Jenbacher reciprocating engine microgrid · 700 MW VoltaGrid BTM</div>
                <div class="card-field"><span class="field-label">Renewables</span>Potential battery integration · LEED planned</div>
                <div class="card-field"><span class="field-label">Timeline</span>First building H2 2026; complete by 2028+</div>
            </div>
            <div class="card-supply">Gas: Local Permian access · existing West Texas infrastructure</div>
        </div>

        <div class="project-card" data-status="construction">
            <div class="card-badges"><span class="badge badge-construction">Active Development</span></div>
            <div class="card-name">Oracle (Doña Ana NM)</div>
            <div class="card-location">Doña Ana County, New Mexico</div>
            <div class="card-capacity">2.45 GW<small>Pivoted to Bloom Energy fuel cells Apr 2026</small></div>
            <div class="card-fields">
                <div class="card-field"><span class="field-label">Tech</span>Bloom Energy fuel cells — natural gas, no combustion turbines (low-NOx)</div>
                <div class="card-field"><span class="field-label">Timeline</span>Oracle revealed as Project Jupiter tenant Mar 2026; fuel cell pivot Apr 2026</div>
            </div>
            <div class="card-supply">Gas: Regional New Mexico access · new pipeline connection</div>
        </div>

        <div class="project-card" data-status="construction">
            <div class="card-badges"><span class="badge badge-construction">Permitted / Early Construction</span></div>
            <div class="card-name">Fermi America Project Matador</div>
            <div class="card-location">Texas (multiple sites)</div>
            <div class="card-capacity">Up to 11 GW<small>phased through 2038</small></div>
            <div class="card-fields">
                <div class="card-field"><span class="field-label">Tech</span>Multiple BTM plants</div>
                <div class="card-field"><span class="field-label">Timeline</span>TCEQ clean air permit approved Feb 2026; 1 GW targeted end-2026</div>
            </div>
            <div class="card-supply">Gas: Near Texas gas fields · pipeline TBD</div>
        </div>

        <div class="project-card" data-status="construction">
            <div class="card-badges"><span class="badge badge-construction">Construction</span></div>
            <div class="card-name">Prometheus Texas Sites</div>
            <div class="card-location">Texas (I-35 Corridor)</div>
            <div class="card-capacity">Up to 300 MW</div>
            <div class="card-fields">
                <div class="card-field"><span class="field-label">Tech</span>On-site gas generation + battery</div>
                <div class="card-field"><span class="field-label">Renewables</span>Engie battery storage</div>
                <div class="card-field"><span class="field-label">Timeline</span>Operational by 2026</div>
            </div>
            <div class="card-supply">Gas: Existing pipelines at Engie sites</div>
        </div>

        <div class="project-card has-ccs" data-status="development">
            <div class="card-badges">
                <span class="badge badge-planning">Announced</span>
                <span class="badge badge-ccs">Carbon-Negative CCS</span>
            </div>
            <div class="card-name">Prometheus Casper Campus</div>
            <div class="card-location">Casper, Wyoming</div>
            <div class="card-capacity">1.5 GW</div>
            <div class="card-fields">
                <div class="card-field"><span class="field-label">Tech</span>Natural gas with carbon capture · carbon-negative strategy</div>
                <div class="card-field"><span class="field-label">Renewables</span>Likely renewables integration</div>
                <div class="card-field"><span class="field-label">Timeline</span>Planned (phased)</div>
            </div>
            <div class="card-supply">Gas: Wyoming gas · on-site CO₂ sequestration planned</div>
        </div>

        <div class="project-card" data-status="development">
            <div class="card-badges"><span class="badge badge-planning">Development</span></div>
            <div class="card-name">FO Permian (Midland) BTM Hub</div>
            <div class="card-location">Midland County, Texas (Permian Basin)</div>
            <div class="card-capacity">150 MW initial<small>Scalable to 5 GW</small></div>
            <div class="card-fields">
                <div class="card-field"><span class="field-label">Tech</span>Modular gas engines</div>
                <div class="card-field"><span class="field-label">Renewables</span>Battery backup</div>
                <div class="card-field"><span class="field-label">Timeline</span>As early as 2026</div>
            </div>
            <div class="card-supply">Gas: On-site Permian gas · direct access</div>
        </div>

        <div class="project-card has-ccs" data-status="construction">
            <div class="card-badges">
                <span class="badge badge-construction">Advanced Development</span>
                <span class="badge badge-ccs">Planned CCS</span>
            </div>
            <div class="card-name">Chevron–Engine No.1 JV</div>
            <div class="card-location">USA (multiple sites)</div>
            <div class="card-capacity">Up to 4 GW<small>by 2027</small></div>
            <div class="card-fields">
                <div class="card-field"><span class="field-label">Tech</span>7× GE 7HA turbines · post-combustion CCS integration</div>
                <div class="card-field"><span class="field-label">Timeline</span>Microsoft exclusive offtake Apr 2026; 4 GW operational target end of 2027</div>
            </div>
            <div class="card-supply">Gas: Chevron gas fields · direct access</div>
        </div>

        <div class="project-card has-ccs" data-status="development">
            <div class="card-badges">
                <span class="badge badge-planning">Advanced — FID Late 2026</span>
                <span class="badge badge-ccs">&gt;90% CO₂ Capture</span>
            </div>
            <div class="card-name">ExxonMobil / NextEra Plant</div>
            <div class="card-location">Southeast US (2,500-acre site, Gulf Coast)</div>
            <div class="card-capacity">1.2 GW</div>
            <div class="card-fields">
                <div class="card-field"><span class="field-label">Tech</span>Combined-cycle gas + CCS · ExxonMobil Low Carbon Solutions · 900+ mile CO₂ pipeline</div>
                <div class="card-field"><span class="field-label">Timeline</span>FID late 2026; hyperscaler offtake marketing Q1 2026</div>
            </div>
            <div class="card-supply">Gas: Exxon production + NextEra infrastructure</div>
        </div>

        <div class="project-card has-ccs" data-status="on-hold">
            <div class="card-badges">
                <span class="badge badge-no-ccs">Collapsed / On Hold</span>
                <span class="badge badge-ccs">Indirect CCS (DAC)</span>
            </div>
            <div class="card-name">Project Horizon (Poolside/CoreWeave)</div>
            <div class="card-location">Pecos County, Texas</div>
            <div class="card-capacity">2 GW<small>8 × 250 MW phases</small></div>
            <div class="card-fields">
                <div class="card-field"><span class="field-label">Tech</span>On-site gas (Oxy's Longfellow Ranch) · tied to DAC carbon removal</div>
                <div class="card-field"><span class="field-label">Timeline</span>CoreWeave terminated anchor lease Apr 2026; Poolside Series C failed; rescue stalled</div>
            </div>
            <div class="card-supply">Gas: Oxy's on-site supply</div>
        </div>

        <div class="project-card" data-status="construction">
            <div class="card-badges"><span class="badge badge-construction">Under Construction</span></div>
            <div class="card-name">CloudBurst Data Centers</div>
            <div class="card-location">San Marcos, Central Texas</div>
            <div class="card-capacity">1.2 GW</div>
            <div class="card-fields">
                <div class="card-field"><span class="field-label">Tech</span>Natural gas generation</div>
                <div class="card-field"><span class="field-label">Timeline</span>Groundbreaking Nov 2025; first 50 MW target Q4 2026</div>
            </div>
            <div class="card-supply">Gas: Energy Transfer Oasis Pipeline (450k MMBtu/day) · dedicated lateral</div>
        </div>

        <div class="project-card" data-status="operational">
            <div class="card-badges"><span class="badge badge-operational">Active Deployment</span></div>
            <div class="card-name">Vantage/VoltaGrid</div>
            <div class="card-location">Multi-site (VA, AZ, OH, WA, Montreal, Quebec City)</div>
            <div class="card-capacity">1+ GW</div>
            <div class="card-fields">
                <div class="card-field"><span class="field-label">Tech</span>VoltaGrid natural gas microgrids · up to 70 MW/site · H₂/RNG ready</div>
                <div class="card-field"><span class="field-label">Timeline</span>Deployment Feb 2025; active rollout</div>
            </div>
            <div class="card-supply">Gas: Regional suppliers at each site</div>
        </div>

        <div class="project-card has-ccs" data-status="construction">
            <div class="card-badges">
                <span class="badge badge-construction">Under Development</span>
                <span class="badge badge-ccs">~250k tonnes CO₂/yr</span>
            </div>
            <div class="card-name">New Era Helium / Sharon AI</div>
            <div class="card-location">Ector County, Permian Basin, Texas (235 acres)</div>
            <div class="card-capacity">250 MW</div>
            <div class="card-fields">
                <div class="card-field"><span class="field-label">Tech</span>Gas-fired plant · net-zero design · 45Q credits · New Era building CCS infrastructure</div>
                <div class="card-field"><span class="field-label">Timeline</span>JV finalized; 100 MW Dec 2026; 250 MW mid-2027</div>
            </div>
            <div class="card-supply">Gas: New Era Permian production (137k+ acres)</div>
        </div>

        <div class="project-card" data-status="construction">
            <div class="card-badges"><span class="badge badge-construction">Under Construction</span></div>
            <div class="card-name">Nscale Monarch Compute Campus<small>Anchor: Microsoft (1.35 GW LOI) + NVIDIA Vera Rubin</small></div>
            <div class="card-location">Mason County, West Virginia</div>
            <div class="card-capacity">2 GW Phase 1<small>8 GW long-term</small></div>
            <div class="card-fields">
                <div class="card-field"><span class="field-label">Tech</span>~864 Cat reciprocating gas engines · entirely off-grid BTM</div>
                <div class="card-field"><span class="field-label">Renewables</span>Battery storage</div>
                <div class="card-field"><span class="field-label">Timeline</span>Phase 1 operational target Jan 2027</div>
            </div>
            <div class="card-supply">Gas: West Virginia gas infrastructure · local connections</div>
        </div>

        <div class="project-card" data-status="development">
            <div class="card-badges"><span class="badge badge-planning">Permitted / Seeking Offtake</span></div>
            <div class="card-name">Crusoe Goodnight Campus<small>Potential offtake: Google (negotiations ongoing)</small></div>
            <div class="card-location">Armstrong County, Texas (Panhandle)</div>
            <div class="card-capacity">933 MW</div>
            <div class="card-fields">
                <div class="card-field"><span class="field-label">Tech</span>Natural gas plant · no grid connection</div>
                <div class="card-field"><span class="field-label">Renewables</span>Wind generation co-located</div>
                <div class="card-field"><span class="field-label">Timeline</span>TCEQ permit filed Jan 2026; offtake not finalized</div>
            </div>
            <div class="card-supply">Gas: Texas Panhandle · local access</div>
        </div>

        <div class="project-card" data-status="development">
            <div class="card-badges"><span class="badge badge-planning">Advanced Development</span></div>
            <div class="card-name">Meta El Paso Campus</div>
            <div class="card-location">El Paso, Texas</div>
            <div class="card-capacity">~813 MW<small>modular generators</small></div>
            <div class="card-fields">
                <div class="card-field"><span class="field-label">Tech</span>813 modular gas generators · El Paso Electric / Enchanted Rock BTM</div>
                <div class="card-field"><span class="field-label">Timeline</span>Announced Mar 2026; part of $10B El Paso campus expansion</div>
            </div>
            <div class="card-supply">Gas: El Paso regional gas infrastructure · local</div>
        </div>

        <div class="project-card" data-status="development">
            <div class="card-badges"><span class="badge badge-planning">Approved / Pre-Construction</span></div>
            <div class="card-name">O'Leary Digital / Stratos Campus</div>
            <div class="card-location">Box Elder County, Utah</div>
            <div class="card-capacity">3 GW Phase 1<small>9 GW long-term · 40,000-acre site</small></div>
            <div class="card-fields">
                <div class="card-field"><span class="field-label">Tech</span>On-site natural gas via Ruby Pipeline connection</div>
                <div class="card-field"><span class="field-label">Timeline</span>Approved Box Elder County May 2026; pre-construction</div>
            </div>
            <div class="card-supply">Gas: Ruby Pipeline · dedicated connection</div>
        </div>

        <div class="project-card" data-status="development">
            <div class="card-badges"><span class="badge badge-planning">Permitting</span></div>
            <div class="card-name">PowerConneX Ashville Energy Center<small>EdgeConneX affiliate · separate from 120 MW New Albany project</small></div>
            <div class="card-location">Pickaway County, Ohio</div>
            <div class="card-capacity">Up to 800 MW</div>
            <div class="card-fields">
                <div class="card-field"><span class="field-label">Tech</span>Natural gas (configuration TBD)</div>
                <div class="card-field"><span class="field-label">Timeline</span>Proposed 2026</div>
            </div>
            <div class="card-supply">Gas: Regional Ohio gas infrastructure · TBD</div>
        </div>

        <div class="project-card" data-status="development">
            <div class="card-badges"><span class="badge badge-planning">Permitting</span></div>
            <div class="card-name">Fleet Data Centers</div>
            <div class="card-location">Storey County, Nevada (Tahoe Reno Industrial Center)</div>
            <div class="card-capacity">350+ MW</div>
            <div class="card-fields">
                <div class="card-field"><span class="field-label">Tech</span>Natural gas and diesel BTM generation</div>
                <div class="card-field"><span class="field-label">Timeline</span>Permitting 2026; construction planned early 2027</div>
            </div>
            <div class="card-supply">Gas: Regional Nevada gas · TBD</div>
        </div>

    </div>

    <div class="key-insights">
        <h2>Key Notes</h2>
        <ul>
            <li><strong>Pipeline Infrastructure:</strong> Most projects leverage existing infrastructure rather than building new major interstate pipelines; lateral connections are common with faster permitting as intrastate</li>
            <li><strong>Geographic Concentration:</strong> Projects co-located with production (Chevron Permian, New Era Helium, Oracle Stargate) avoid long-distance pipeline needs; Haynesville Shale and Permian Basin provide abundant, proximate supply</li>
            <li><strong>Technology Preferences:</strong> Mix of aeroderivative and industrial gas turbines; simple-cycle for faster deployment vs. combined-cycle for efficiency; mobile/modular units from VoltaGrid and Solaris for rapid deployment</li>
            <li><strong>Timeline Drivers:</strong> Grid queue times now 5–10 years in major data center markets; BTM gas operational in 12–24 months; direct pipeline laterals avoid grid interconnection delays</li>
            <li><strong>Environmental Features:</strong> 5 projects include CCS provisions (45Q tax credit eligible); hybrid approaches combining gas with solar, wind, and battery storage; some designed for future hydrogen compatibility</li>
            <li><strong>Market Scale:</strong> Data centers could consume 6–10 Bcf/day of natural gas by 2027 (~10% of total US consumption); over 200 gas-fired power units in development for the data center sector</li>
            <li><strong>EPA Permitting Shift (Jan 2026):</strong> EPA closed the non-road engine loophole that allowed large gas turbines to bypass Clean Air Act permits; new rule finalizing Sep 2026 raises the bar for all future BTM installations</li>
            <li><strong>Technology Diversification:</strong> Oracle's Doña Ana pivot to Bloom Energy fuel cells (2.45 GW) marks a significant move away from combustion turbines — lower NOx and fewer permitting hurdles</li>
            <li><strong>Construction Cost Surge:</strong> Natural gas power plant costs rose 66% in two years (from ~$1,500/kW in 2023 to $2,157/kW in 2025) with build times 23% longer, constraining project economics</li>
        </ul>
    </div>

    <div class="footer">
        <p>Industry data compiled from company press releases, regulatory filings, and energy trade publications | May 2026</p>
        <p style="margin-top: 8px; font-size: 0.62rem; opacity: 0.8;">For research purposes only. Verify all details with primary sources before making business decisions.</p>
    </div>
</div>
</div>
<script>
(function () {
    var widget = document.querySelector('[data-widget="w-btm-projects"]');
    if (!widget) return;
    var buttons = widget.querySelectorAll('.tab-btn');
    var cards   = widget.querySelectorAll('.project-card');
    buttons.forEach(function (btn) {
        btn.addEventListener('click', function () {
            var tab = this.getAttribute('data-tab');
            buttons.forEach(function (b) { b.classList.remove('active'); });
            this.classList.add('active');
            cards.forEach(function (card) {
                var show = tab === 'all' || card.getAttribute('data-status') === tab;
                card.classList.toggle('hidden', !show);
            });
        });
    });
}());
</script>
```
